chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett No.D-123 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.587/2025 (Ex/A) 3. For hearing of main case 29.09.2025 Syed Muhammad Ali Shah, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Shahryar I Awan, Asstt. A.G ************** Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the present Constitutional Petition and submits that the petitioner intends to avail an alternate remedy by filing a civil suit or initiating any other proceedings under the law before the proper forum for appropriate relief. Accordingly, the present Constitutional Petition stands dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
